summary: Collected agent-operated local Beta playthrough evidence from the web preview surface. The evidence records build commit b49e8956732a00e87e395243cb9aace367670547, seed 1531 as surfaced by the selected scenario label, selected scenario 1531 Edge Polity Composite Scenario, save/load checkpoint visibility, local client-session checkpoint output, Windows/Chrome preview context, zh-CN locale, 1440x900 resolution, and the current defect/Human Gate boundary. This is REVIEW evidence only, not manual acceptance approval; formal/manual human judgment remains routed to the M7 content-lock Human Gate if acceptance is required.

Formal manual acceptance remains routed to M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 if human judgment is required.

Exact manual acceptance requires a Human Gate and is intentionally not approved here.
The observed duration is a local evidence sweep rather than a human stopwatch over a real manual playthrough.
